metricEn: Description of how price information for each product is disclosed to customers or to their agents
metric: 說明各項產品價格資訊如何揭露給顧客或其代理人

metricEn: (1) Percentage change in weighted average list price across product portfolio compared to previous reporting period
metric: (1) 加權平均定價相較前一報告期間的變動百分比

metricEn: (2) Percentage change in weighted average net price across product portfolio compared to previous reporting period
metric: (2) 加權平均淨價相較前一報告期間的變動百分比

metricEn: (1) Number of recalls issued
metric: (1) 發布產品召回的次數

metricEn: (2) Total units recalled
metric: (2) 總召回產品單位數

metricEn: Products listed in any public medical product safety or adverse event alert database
metric: 列入任何公開醫療產品安全或不良事件警示資料庫的產品

metricEn: Number of fatalities associated with products
metric: 與產品相關的死亡事件數量

metricEn: Number of enforcement actions taken in response to violations of good manufacturing practices (GMP) or equivalent standards, by type
metric: 因違反良好製造規範（GMP）或同等標準而採取之執法行動次數，按類型區分

metricEn: Total amount of monetary losses as a result of legal proceedings associated with false marketing claims
metric: 因虛假行銷主張所引發之法律訴訟造成的金額損失總額

metricEn: Description of code of ethics governing promotion of off-label use of products
metric: 說明規範產品非標示用途推廣行為的倫理準則

metricEn: Discussion of process to assess and manage environmental and human health considerations associated with chemicals in products, and meet demand for sustainable products
metric: 說明評估與管理產品中化學品對環境與人體健康影響之流程，並因應永續產品的市場需求

metricEn: (1) Total amount of products accepted for take-back and reused, recycled or donated, broken down by: (1) devices and equipment
metric: (1) 接受回收、重複使用、捐贈之產品總量：設備與器材類別

metricEn: (2) Total amount of products accepted for take-back and reused, recycled or donated, broken down by: (2) supplies
metric: (2) 接受回收、重複使用、捐贈之產品總量：耗材類別

metricEn: Percentage of (1) entity’s facilities participating in third-party audit programmes for manufacturing and product quality
metric: (1) 實體設施參與製造與產品品質第三方稽核計畫之比例

metricEn: Percentage of (2) Tier 1 suppliers’ facilities participating in third-party audit programmes for manufacturing and product quality
metric: (2) 第一層供應商設施參與製造與產品品質第三方稽核計畫之比例

metricEn: Description of efforts to maintain traceability within the distribution chain
metric: 說明於配銷鏈中維持產品可追溯性之措施

metricEn: Description of the management of risks associated with the use of critical materials
metric: 說明與關鍵原料使用相關之風險管理措施

metricEn: Total amount of monetary losses as a result of legal proceedings associated with bribery or corruption
metric: 因行賄或貪污相關法律訴訟所造成之金額損失總額

metricEn: Description of code of ethics governing interactions with health care professionals
metric: 說明規範與醫療專業人員互動的倫理準則

metricEn: Number of units sold by product category
metric: 依產品類別劃分之銷售單位總數
